description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt made of 100% polyester, that has ribbing around the neckline and tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves, white mesh panel insert on the front and on the left sleeve and embroidered cat logo on the upper right chest FittingRegularWash careGentle machine wash in lukewarm waterUse mild detergentDo not tumble dry, bleach or dry cleanUse warm ironBold and stylish, this black T-shirt from puma is perfect for everyday wear. The mesh inserts on the front allow for greater ventialtion and also added style, while the embroidered cat logo adds to the brand appel. Team this with jeans or tracks and cool sports shoes for a great casual look.Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
